terminology.summary: Extracted 10 organization terms and 5 standard phrases

standard_phrases: Sanitize all penetrations with 70% IPA prior to sterile connection
Record the room number and equipment ID
Notify the supervisor of any deviation
Verify label matches Part No., Lot No., and Subject ID

rules: All aseptic operations inside the Biosafety Cabinet are preceded by [BSC] in the procedure text.
Two-person verification is required at every record-a-measurement step.
Times are recorded in 24-hour format (HHMM) with ±2 minute tolerance unless otherwise specified.
Every deviation from the procedure is recorded in the Deviations section, no matter how minor.
Centrifugations use a counter-balanced second container matching the test-tube mass within 1 g.
Labels are applied only after verification against the Part No., Lot No., and Subject ID.
Bag ports, vial septa, and tubing penetrations are sanitized with 70% IPA before sterile connection.

writing_style.summary: Passive voice, imperative verbs, third-person impersonal

sentence_patterns: Record the <measurement> on the batch record.

section_structure.summary: Hierarchical X.Y.Z numbering with landscape layout

knowledge.header_pattern: Logo (left, 2 cols) | Document title (center, bold 12pt) | Page N of M (right) with Doc #, Effective Date, Rev
knowledge.footer_pattern: Confidential — For use within Fred Hutch Cell Processing Facility only. Printed copies are uncontrolled.
table_conventions: Every table uses a fixed layout with DXA-specified column widths (table-level tblLayout=fixed).
Section-header rows span the full table width with BFBFBF shading and bold white-on-gray text.
Label/value rows use F2F2F2 in column 1 and white in column 2.
All six borders (top/left/bottom/right/insideH/insideV) are a single 0.5pt rule in the 'auto' color.
observations: Theme fonts resolve to Calibri (major/headings) and Cambria (minor/body).
Nine numbering definitions in numbering.xml; all are bullet lists with ascending indent.
Page size is 15840 x 12240 DXA (landscape US Letter), with 1080/720/720/720 DXA margins.

table_templates.summary: 5 reusable table patterns: approval block, equipment list, step procedure, references, post-process review

templates.name: approval_block
templates.description: 3-column approval sign-off: Role | Name | Date. Header row BFBFBF.

templates.name: step_procedure
templates.description: 8-column step procedure: Step # | Instruction | Variable | Result | Performed By | Date | Time | Verified By.

templates.name: equipment_list
templates.description: 4-column equipment: # | Description | Equipment ID | Last Service Date. Header row BFBFBF.

templates.name: references
templates.description: 2-column reference list: Doc # | Title. Header row BFBFBF.

templates.name: post_process_review
templates.description: 3-column manufacturing review checklist: Item | Manufacturer | QA.
